zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱延续
zh.content:
当前/USD呈震荡偏弱结构，价格运行在6.21附近，整体仍受短期均线压制，空头略占优势多头动能不足短线仍偏谨慎等待方向选择  

技术指标显示MACD持续位于零轴下方，动能柱为负，短期下行动能仍在延续SMA20=6.31781构成上方压制RSI缺失但中性偏弱  

支撑位关注6.20整数关口，若跌破可能进一步测试6.18区域，短线风险增加上方阻力在6.26与6.32附近突破需放量确认信号  

交易建议以反弹做空为主思路，未站稳6.32前不宜追多，控制仓位等待确认信号若跌破6.20则顺势延续空头止损设于6.32上方位

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is exhibiting a mild short-term bearish structure, trading at 6.2121 after a 0.68% daily decline. Price action remains compressed between 6.2586 and 6.2021, indicating indecision near intraday lows. The market continues to form lower highs beneath recent local peaks, suggesting fading bullish momentum. Sellers are gradually pressing price toward the lower boundary of the current range, while buyers have yet to establish strong recovery strength.

Short-term indicators reinforce downside pressure. Price is trading below the 20-period SMA at 6.31781, confirming a bearish trend bias and failed recovery attempts. The MACD reading at -0.0566 signals weakening momentum and sustained seller control, while the absence of RSI limits overbought/oversold clarity. Overall, momentum structure favors continued consolidation-to-downside unless a decisive reclaim of the SMA occurs with volume expansion.

Immediate support is located at 6.20, aligned with the session low at 6.2021. A breakdown below this zone could expose 6.15, followed by a psychological level near 6.00. On the upside, resistance is firm at 6.2586 and stronger at the SMA20 around 6.31781. A break above 6.32 would be required to shift short-term sentiment toward recovery and potential trend stabilization.

Trading strategy remains cautious in current conditions. Aggressive traders may consider short positions on rebounds toward 6.25–6.32 with protective stops above 6.33 to manage risk. Conservative participants should wait for confirmation: either a break above the SMA20 for bullish recovery or a breakdown below 6.20 for continuation shorts. Given compressed volatility, position sizing should stay moderate to reduce exposure to false breakouts and whipsaw price action.
